description: Redis memory exhaustion during Black Friday caused cart session eviction and database connection pool saturation.

payload.title: Redis Memory Critical - Checkout Service
payload.body: Redis memory consumption exceeded 6.1GB (maxmemory=4GB) during Black Friday peak. Eviction policy triggered, dropping active cart sessions. 1,847 abandoned checkouts, ~$340,000 GMV lost.

payload.title: Checkout Service P99 Latency Spike
payload.body: P99 latency spiked to 8.5 seconds as checkout-service exhausted connection pool trying to reconstruct sessions from database. 12,300+ customers affected.

description: Stripe webhook retry storm due to upstream infrastructure issues caused duplicate order creation due to insufficient idempotency deduplication.

payload.title: Payment Webhook Error Rate Spike
payload.body: Stripe webhook retry storm inbound with 5x normal volume. Webhook error rate exceeded 15% as checkout-service struggled to process burst. 312 duplicate orders created.

issue.title: Duplicate order created due to race condition in idempotency check

description: Fraud-service ML model cold start caused 30-second delays without timeout, exhausting checkout-service connection pool.

payload.title: Checkout Success Rate Critical Drop
payload.body: Checkout success rate plummeted to 6% as fraud-service cold start caused goroutine pile-up. 8,900 failed attempts, ~$1.6M GMV lost in 11 minutes.

issue.title: Context deadline exceeded waiting for fraud-service RPC

description: Elasticsearch snapshot restore during index rebalancing corrupted shard mappings, causing 40% of queries to return zero results.

payload.title: Elasticsearch Search Zero Results Rate Critical
payload.body: Search index corruption detected: 40% of common product queries returning zero results. Product discoverability broken for 87 minutes. Snapshot restore during rebalancing corrupted shard mappings.

issue.title: Elasticsearch shard mapping validation failed after restore

description: Concurrent product update during feed sync created database lock that escalated to table-level, halting all feed processing.

payload.title: Product Feed Sync Job Hung
payload.body: Product feed sync job hung indefinitely due to table-level lock from concurrent update. 2 SKUs unable to be updated. New products invisible for 49 minutes.

issue.title: Database transaction timeout: feed sync deadlock

description: CDN origin health check misconfigured with overly strict 50ms timeout, marking healthy origin unhealthy and overloading backup.

payload.title: CDN Origin 403 Error Rate Critical
payload.body: 38 minutes of 403 errors on product image requests. Primary origin marked unhealthy by misconfigured 50ms health check timeout. All traffic routed to rate-limited backup origin. 45,000 customers affected.

issue.title: CDN origin health check timeout misconfiguration

description: Cache invalidation routine had off-by-one error in URL path matching, leaving stale product images served for 36 minutes.

payload.title: Stale Content Detected - CDN Cache
payload.body: Stale product images served for 36 minutes due to cache invalidation regex off-by-one error. 34,000 impressions with incorrect product photos causing customer confusion.

issue.title: Cache invalidation purge request pattern mismatch

description: Cloudflare rate limit rule had incorrect subnet definition, grouping legitimate user traffic with bot patterns.

payload.title: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests Surge
payload.body: Legitimate traffic rate-limited for 37 minutes during peak traffic. Cloudflare rule misconfigured with wrong subnet definition. Thousands of 429 responses returned to legitimate users.

issue.title: Cloudflare rate limit rule subnet configuration error

description: Frontend build process failed silently during deployment, preventing asset upload to CDN origin.

payload.title: Static Assets 404 Not Found
payload.body: 27 minutes of 404 errors on CSS/JS assets after deployment. Frontend build failed silently without uploading assets to CDN origin. 23,000 users affected with broken storefront styling.

issue.title: Missing static assets in CDN origin after deployment

description: Redis session store had no replica, network partition isolated single node with no automatic failover.

payload.title: Session Store Redis Connection Lost
payload.body: Sessions dropped mid-request for 35 minutes as network partition isolated single Redis node. Users logged out unexpectedly. 4,100+ unexpected re-authentication attempts.

issue.title: Redis session store unavailable - connection refused

description: Token refresh logic had O(n) query to check 50,000-entry revocation list without caching, causing severe latency degradation.

payload.title: JWT Token Refresh Endpoint P99 Latency Critical
payload.body: Token refresh endpoint P99 latency spike to 8.2 seconds. O(n) revocation list query without caching. 50,000+ revoked tokens accumulated causing 28 minutes degradation.

issue.title: Slow database query in token revocation check

description: SAML IdP certificate rotated upstream without service config update, breaking enterprise SSO.

payload.title: SAML SSO Authentication Failure Rate Critical
payload.body: Enterprise SSO users unable to login for 28 minutes. SAML IdP certificate rotated upstream without service config update. 12 companies affected, escalations to account managers.

issue.title: SAML signature verification failed - certificate expired

description: Malformed message in queue was re-queued infinitely without max retry logic, blocking all order processing.

payload.title: Background Worker Queue Processing Stalled
payload.body: 44 minutes of failed order processing. Poison message in queue re-queued infinitely without max retry threshold. 3,240 orders queued but not processed, cascading delays.

issue.title: Malformed message in Celery queue - infinite retry loop

description: Celery worker memory leak in task result processing held large objects in memory without cleanup.

payload.title: Celery Worker Memory Exhaustion - OOM Kills
payload.body: Worker processes OOM-killed during high-volume processing. Memory leak in task result handling holding large objects without cleanup. 38 minutes degraded throughput, order lag accumulated.

issue.title: MemoryError: worker process killed by kernel OOM

description: Scheduled task ran concurrently with manual trigger without locking, causing duplicate inventory adjustments.

payload.title: Inventory Adjustment Duplicate Processing
payload.body: Scheduled task executed concurrently with manual trigger for 54 minutes. No distributed locking or idempotency checks. 847 items double-decremented from stock, manual reconciliation required.

issue.title: Inventory sync task executed concurrently without lock

description: Analytics workload on OLTP read replica without query timeout caused replica lag, serving stale inventory.

payload.title: Database Read Replica Lag Critical
payload.body: Read replica lag reached critical threshold due to long-running analytics query. Stale inventory reads for 24 minutes. 156 items oversold, $7,200 in refunds issued.

issue.title: Stale data read from replica - lag exceeded threshold

description: Long-running transaction held connection without releasing, exhausting connection pool with no timeout.

payload.title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
payload.body: Connection pool max size reached as long-running transaction held connection. Service unable to acquire DB connections for 36 minutes. All queries timing out.

issue.title: Unable to acquire database connection - pool exhausted

description: Popular item cache keys expired simultaneously causing 500+ concurrent requests to hit database.

payload.title: Database Query Latency Spike - Cache Stampede
payload.body: Cache stampede detected: popular item cache keys expired simultaneously. 500+ concurrent requests hit database for same key. P99 latency 5.2 seconds, cache hit rate dropped to 2%.

issue.title: Database connection timeout under cache stampede load
